title: Campaign Planning and Execution
shortSummary: A marketing campaign is a coordinated effort to achieve a specific goal within a set timeframe. This module teaches you how to plan campaigns from brief to launch, coordinate across channels, manage timelines, and measure success.
whyItMatters: Random acts of marketing do not work. Campaigns give your efforts structure, focus, and measurability. Whether you are launching a product, running a seasonal promotion, or building awareness, campaign planning ensures every piece of content, every ad, and every email works together toward a single goal instead of pulling in different directions.
coreConcepts: What makes a campaign different from ongoing marketing
The campaign brief: goals, audience, message, channels, timeline, budget
Channel selection and integrated campaign strategy
Creative development: messaging, assets, and production
Launch, monitor, and optimise: the campaign lifecycle
